tools.name: search_bids
tools.description: 日本全国の官公需入札情報を検索する。Search Japanese public procurement bids.

tools.name: search_bids_app
tools.description: 官公需入札検索テーブル。MCP Apps対応クライアントで検索結果を表で表示。

tools.name: rank_bids
tools.description: 入札案件を自社条件でAIスコアリング。Rank bids by company fit.

tools.name: list_recent_bids
tools.description: 直近の入札公告一覧を取得。List recent bid announcements.

tools.name: get_bid_detail
tools.description: 案件の詳細情報を取得。Get bid detail by key.

tools.name: explain_bid_fit
tools.description: 入札案件の適合度をAIが詳細説明。AI-powered fit explanation.

tools.name: assess_bid_qualification
tools.description: 入札参加資格の自動確認。Auto-check bid qualification.

tools.name: extract_bid_requirements
tools.description: PDF/HTML仕様書から要件を構造化抽出。Extract requirements from specs.

tools.name: export_bid_shortlist
tools.description: CSV/JSONエクスポート。Export shortlisted bids.

tools.name: create_bid_calendar
tools.description: 締切日のICSカレンダー生成。Generate ICS calendar for deadlines.

tools.name: create_bid_review_packet
tools.description: 社内検討メモ自動生成。Generate internal review packet.

tools.name: draft_bid_questions
tools.description: 質問書ドラフト生成。Draft clarification questions.

tools.name: analyze_past_awards
tools.description: 落札実績の分析。Analyze historical award data.

tools.name: summarize_bids_by_org
tools.description: 発注機関別サマリー。Summarize bids by organization.

tools.name: save_search
tools.description: 検索条件を保存する。Save search criteria for alerts.

tools.name: check_saved_search
tools.description: 保存検索の新着確認。Check for new bids since last check.

tools.name: list_saved_searches
tools.description: 保存検索の一覧。List all saved searches.

prompts.name: morning_bid_briefing
prompts.description: 今日の入札ブリーフィング
